title: inventory
description: Output contract for intermediate/inventory.json (Step 1b). Consumed by Steps 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7. See mellea-fy-inventory.md for the authoritative 17-tag table, the C1-C9 category definitions, and the forbidden tag+category combinations enforced cross-element.

format_version.description: Format version of this inventory document (e.g. '1.0').

elements.description: Ordered list of inventory elements in source order. element_id values MUST be sequential with no gaps (e.g. elem_001, elem_002, ...). Forbidden tag+category combinations (SCHEMA + non-—, CONFIG + C4/C5/C9, TOOL_TEMPLATE + non-C6, NO_DECOMPOSE + non-—) are not enforced by JSON Schema and must be checked by Step 1b's cross-element pass.

element_id.description: Zero-padded sequential identifier (elem_001, elem_002, ...). Stable within a run; not stable across re-runs when source changes.

source_file.description: Path of the source file the element was extracted from. MUST refer to a file from Step 1a's file inventory list.

source_lines.description: Line range in source_file (e.g. '15-22' or single line '12').

tag.description: One of the 17 tags from the tag table. See mellea-fy-inventory.md.

category.description: Dependency category C1-C9 or '—' (em-dash) for elements with no external dependency.

content_summary.description: One-sentence summary of the element's purpose. Used by Step 6 to populate descriptions in the mapping report and categories_resolved.

content_full.description: Optional. Verbatim content of the source lines (may be multi-line). Used by Step 2 for phrase-match heuristics (e.g. CONVERSE realisation, VALIDATE_OUTPUT semantic-vs-executable).

aggregation_hint.description: Set by Step 1b's cross-element pass to flag aggregation candidates (near-identical VALIDATE_OUTPUT, duplicate CONFIG names, sequential ORCHESTRATE chains). Step 2.5a commits the aggregation. Null when no hint applies.

notes.description: Optional free-form annotations (e.g. retry-failure record 'refinement failed after 3 retries: <reason>').

dialect_attribution.description: Optional. The dialect-doc row that produced this element (e.g. 'openclaw:AGENTS.md body rule'). Used by Step 6's mapping report.

category.description: Dependency category. C1=Identity, C2=Operating rules, C3=User/env facts, C4=Short-term state, C5=Long-term memory, C6=Tools, C7=Credentials, C8=Runtime env, C9=Scheduling. '—' (U+2014 em-dash) means no external dependency.
